salesSignals.text: Mid-migration after signing Monta in Dec 2025. Near-term replacement conversation is unlikely while rollout stabilizes.
Ecosystem integration is central. Bundled billing and subscription portability indicate deep utility-system dependencies.
Truck charging is a strategic expansion area. Could trigger separate capability requirements if current platform fit is weak.
Home + public + workplace is already active. Platform fit must cover all three segments, not only public charging.
App quality previously drove vendor change. If migration quality disappoints again, a future opening may appear.

openQuestions: Was the Monta tender driven primarily by app quality or broader platform limitations?
What are the commercial terms and breakpoints in the new CPMS contract?
Will truck charging run in the same platform or be handled separately?
How custom is the bundled electricity + EV billing integration?
Who owns CPMS vendor governance internally at ON Power?

synthesis.verdictText: ON Power is currently in a fresh Monta migration cycle, so immediate displacement is unlikely. It remains strategically relevant to monitor for post-migration friction, especially around truck charging and deep utility billing integration.

hypotheses.label: Migration friction may surface after initial rollout
hypotheses.text: Complex requirements like bundled billing and housing-association splits can expose platform gaps after go-live pressure declines.

hypotheses.label: Ecosystem lock-in is the real product strategy
hypotheses.text: Winning ON Power requires proving stronger fit with utility workflows, not just better charging-session features.

hypotheses.label: Truck charging may create a second evaluation cycle
hypotheses.text: If heavy-duty charging needs diverge from current setup, ON Power may reconsider platform architecture sooner than expected.

uncertainties: Contract maturity is very early; switching appetite may be low for 12-24 months.
Iceland is a smaller market, limiting near-term commercial upside.
Truck charging timelines may slip versus current ambition statements.

contacts.name: Head of EV Charging / CTO
contacts.title: ON Power
contacts.note: Likely decision owner for CPMS and integration roadmap.

synthesis.contactsNote: Track migration sentiment through app reviews and operator updates; reassess when rollout stabilizes.
